description: Macaronic poem alternating between Hebrew and Judaeo-Arabic every couple of words. Dating: maybe ca. 13th century, which is also consistent with the hand and style of the pen trials on verso (al-mamlūk Makīn yuqabbil al-arḍ....).
description_he: טקסט ספרותי בHebrew, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
